mapper.select: /* DircMapper.selectWorkOrderDtlDate */ SELECT TOI.OPERTDRCT_ID , DATE_FORMAT(TOI.OPERT_DT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS OPERT_DT , TOI.OPERTSTD_ID , TOI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID , TOI.ORDER_ID , TOI.CNNC_ID , CONCAT(SUBSTR(TOI.BEGIN_TM, 1, 2), ':', SUBSTR(TOI.BEGIN_TM, 3, 2)) AS BEGIN_TM , CONCAT(SUBSTR(TOI.END_TM, 1, 2), ':', SUBSTR(TOI.END_TM, 3, 2)) AS END_TM , TOI.REGIST_CD , DATE_FORMAT(TOI.REGIST_DT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS REGIST_DT , TOD.OPERTDRCT_DTL_ID , TOD.ORDER_DTL_ID , TOD.PRDUCT_ID , TOD.DSGN_ID , TPI.PRDUCT_NM , TPI.PRDUCT_M_CODE , TPI.PRDUCT_TY , TPCI.CMMN_NM AS PRDUCT_TY_NM , TPII.IMG_ID , ICF.FILE_LINK_PATH AS PRDUCT_IMG_FILE , TBI.BRAND_ID , TBI.BRAND_NM , TCI.CLIENT_ID , TCI.CLIENT_NM , TEI.EQPMN_NCNM , TECI.CMMN_NM AS EQPMN_NM #, CONCAT(TECI.ADD_1, '-', TEI.EQPMN_NCNM, '[', TEI.EQPMN_SN, ']') AS EQPMN_NM , TECI.ADD_1 , TEI.EQPMN_CD , REPLACE(ICF2.FILE_LINK_PATH, ICF2.FILE_NEW_NM , '') AS DTL_FILE_PATH , ICF2.FILE_SN , ICF2.FILE_ORG_NM , ICF2.FILE_NEW_NM , ICF2.FILE_LINK_PATH , TOI2.RM , IUI.USER_NM , TEOM.OP_ID , TOI3.TOT_ORDER_QTY , ( SELECT SUM(GOAL_QTY) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_OPERTSTD_PROCS_INFO WHERE OPERTSTD_ID = TOI.OPERTSTD_ID) FROM TB_OPERTDRCT_DETAIL A WHERE A.ORDER_ID = TOI.ORDER_ID AND A.OPERT_DT = TOI.OPERT_DT ) AS ORDER_QTY FROM TB_OPERTDRCT_INFO TOI INNER JOIN TB_OPERTDRCT_DETAIL TOD ON TOI.OPERTDRCT_ID = TOD.OPERTDRCT_ID AND TOI.OPERT_DT = TOD.OPERT_DT INNER JOIN TB_ORDER_DETAIL TORD ON TOD.ORDER_DTL_ID = TORD.ORDER_DTL_ID AND TOD.ORDER_ID = TORD.ORDER_ID AND TOD.PRDUCT_ID = TORD.PRDUCT_ID AND TOD.DSGN_ID = TORD.DSGN_ID INNER JOIN TB_ORDER_PRDUCT_MAPNG TOPM ON TORD.ORDER_ID = TOPM.ORDER_ID AND TORD.PRDUCT_ID = TOPM.PRDUCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_PRDUCT_INFO TPI ON TOPM.PRDUCT_ID = TPI.PRDUCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_CMMN_INFO TPCI ON TPCI.CODE_SE = 'PRDT' AND TPI.PRDUCT_TY = TPCI.CMMN_CD AND TPI.FCTRY_ID = TPCI.FCTRY_ID AND TPI.BPLC_ID = TPCI.BPLC_ID LEFT JOIN TB_PRDUCT_IMG_INFO TPII ON TPI.PRDUCT_ID = TPII.PRDUCT_ID AND TPII.IMG_ID = '1' LEFT JOIN IFI_CMMN_FILE ICF ON TPII.FILE_SN = ICF.FILE_SN INNER JOIN TB_EQPMN_OP_MAPNG TEOM ON TOI.CNNC_ID = TEOM.CNNC_ID INNER JOIN TB_BRAND_INFO TBI ON TPI.BRAND_ID = TBI.BRAND_ID INNER JOIN TB_CLIENT_INFO TCI ON TBI.CLIENT_ID = TCI.CLIENT_ID AND TBI.BPLC_ID = TCI.BPLC_ID INNER JOIN TB_EQPMN_INFO TEI ON TEOM.EQPMN_ID = TEI.EQPMN_ID INNER JOIN TB_CMMN_INFO TECI ON TECI.CODE_SE = 'EQPM' AND TEI.FCTRY_ID = TECI.FCTRY_ID AND TEI.BPLC_ID = TECI.BPLC_ID AND TEI.EQPMN_CD = TECI.CMMN_CD INNER JOIN TB_OPERTSTD_PROCS_INFO TOPI ON TOI.OPERTSTD_ID = TOPI.OPERTSTD_ID AND TOI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID = TOPI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID LEFT JOIN TB_OPERTSTD_PROCS_ATCHMNFL_INFO TOPAI ON TOPI.OPERTSTD_ID = TOPAI.OPERTSTD_ID AND TOPI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID = TOPAI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID LEFT JOIN IFI_CMMN_FILE ICF2 ON TOPAI.FILE_SN = ICF2.FILE_SN INNER JOIN TB_OPERTSTD_INFO TOI2 ON TOPI.OPERTSTD_ID = TOI2.OPERTSTD_ID INNER JOIN IFI_USER_MNG_MAPNG IUMM ON TOI.REGIST_CD = IUMM.USER_CD INNER JOIN IFI_USER_INFO IUI ON IUMM.USER_ID = IUI.USER_ID INNER JOIN TB_ORDER_INFO TOI3 ON TOI.ORDER_ID = TOI3.ORDER_ID WHERE TOI.OPERTDRCT_ID = #{opertdrctId} AND TOD.OPERTDRCT_DTL_ID = #{opertdrctDtlId} AND TOI.OPERT_DT = #{opertDt} AND TEOM.OP_ID = #{opId}

/* DircMapper.selectDesignList */ SELECT LPAD(ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TOI.OPERTDRCT_ID, TOD.OPERTDRCT_DTL_ID, TPDI.COLOR_ID, TPDI.SIZE_ID), 2, '0') AS RNUM , TOI.OPERTDRCT_ID , TOI.OPERTSTD_ID , TOI.OPERT_DT , TOI.ORDER_ID , TOD.OPERTDRCT_DTL_ID , TOD.GOAL_QTY , TOPI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID , TPI.PRDUCT_NM , TPI.PRDUCT_M_CODE , TPDI.DSGN_M_CODE , TPDI.COLOR_ID , TPDI.SIZE_ID , TCI.CMMN_NM AS COLOR_NM , TCI2.CMMN_NM AS SIZE_NM , TEOM.OP_ID FROM TB_OPERTDRCT_INFO TOI INNER JOIN TB_OPERTDRCT_DETAIL TOD ON TOI.OPERTDRCT_ID = TOD.OPERTDRCT_ID AND TOI.OPERT_DT = TOD.OPERT_DT INNER JOIN TB_OPERTSTD_PROCS_INFO TOPI ON TOI.OPERTSTD_ID = TOPI.OPERTSTD_ID AND TOI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID = TOPI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID INNER JOIN TB_ORDER_DETAIL TOD2 ON TOD.ORDER_ID = TOD2.ORDER_ID AND TOD.PRDUCT_ID = TOD2.PRDUCT_ID AND TOD.DSGN_ID = TOD2.DSGN_ID INNER JOIN TB_ORDER_PRDUCT_MAPNG TOPM ON TOD2.ORDER_ID = TOPM.ORDER_ID AND TOD2.PRDUCT_ID = TOPM.PRDUCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_PRDUCT_INFO TPI ON TOPM.PRDUCT_ID = TPI.PRDUCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_PRDUCT_DSGN_INFO TPDI ON TPI.PRDUCT_ID = TPDI.PRDUCT_ID AND TOD2.DSGN_ID = TPDI.DSGN_ID INNER JOIN TB_CMMN_INFO TCI ON TCI.CODE_SE = 'COLR' AND TPDI.COLOR_ID = TCI.CMMN_CD AND TCI.BPLC_ID = #{bplcId} AND TCI.FCTRY_ID = #{fctryId} INNER JOIN TB_CMMN_INFO TCI2 ON TCI2.CODE_SE = 'SIZE' AND TPDI.SIZE_ID = TCI2.CMMN_CD AND TCI.BPLC_ID = TCI2.BPLC_ID AND TCI.FCTRY_ID = TCI2.FCTRY_ID INNER JOIN TB_EQPMN_OP_MAPNG TEOM ON TOI.CNNC_ID = TEOM.CNNC_ID WHERE TOI.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND TOI.OPERT_DT = #{opertDt} AND TEOM.OP_ID = #{opId} GROUP BY TOI.OPERTDRCT_ID, TOD.OPERTDRCT_DTL_ID

/* DircMapper.selectProcsList */ SELECT LPAD(ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TOI.OPERTSTD_ID, TOI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID), 2, '0') AS RNUM , TOI.OPERTSTD_ID , TOI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID , TOPI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_NM , TOPI.PROCS_ID , TOPI.MODE_SE , TOPI.CT_CNT , TOPI.ND_CNT , TOPI.INTRVL , TOPI.STD_TM , TOPI.STD_PROCS_TM , TOPI.STD_PROCS_RATE , TOPI.EQPMN_CD , TCI2.CMMN_NM AS EQPMN_NM , TCI2.ADD_1 , TOPI.PROCS_PRC , LPAD(TOPI.PROCS_ORD_SN, 2, '0') AS PROCS_ORD_SN , TEOM.OP_ID , TEI.EQPMN_NCNM FROM TB_OPERTDRCT_INFO TOI INNER JOIN TB_OPERTSTD_PROCS_INFO TOPI ON TOI.OPERTSTD_ID = TOPI.OPERTSTD_ID AND TOI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID = TOPI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID INNER JOIN TB_CMMN_INFO TCI2 ON TCI2.CODE_SE = 'EQPM' AND TOPI.EQPMN_CD = TCI2.CMMN_CD AND TCI2.BPLC_ID = #{bplcId} AND TCI2.FCTRY_ID = #{fctryId} INNER JOIN TB_EQPMN_OP_MAPNG TEOM ON TOI.CNNC_ID = TEOM.CNNC_ID INNER JOIN TB_EQPMN_INFO TEI ON TEOM.EQPMN_ID = TEI.EQPMN_ID WHERE TOI.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND TOI.OPERT_DT = #{opertDt} AND TEOM.OP_ID = #{opId} GROUP BY TOI.OPERTSTD_ID, TOI.OPERTSTD_PROCS_ID
